results.rendered_html:
anavasara a.
1 Busy, having no leisure or interval of repose.
2 Ill-timed, inopportune.
3 Out of
(pb) place, baseless; ˚royaṃ ghaṃṭānādaḥ  H. 3. 
— raḥ
1 Absence of leisure.
2 Ill-timedness, unseasonableness; kaṃ yāce yatra tatra dhruvamanavasaragrasta evārthibhāvaḥ  Māl. 9. 30.
